philippines.title: Bb. Pilipinas runner-up Dalia Varde Khattab recounts getting stranded in Dubai
philippines.description:
Binibining Pilipinas runner-up Dalia Varde Khattab missed several activities since the national pageant kicked off its 2026 edition in March. And that was because she was in the United Arab Emirates and could not take a flight back to Manila. “I was supposed to be here during the final screening for Bb. Pilipinas. But sadly I couldn’t make it because my flight to Manila got canceled. It kept getting canceled because of the air traffic situation, it was a whole commotion talaga (really),” she told Inquirer Entertainment in an interview. The part-Arab actress-turned beauty queen was only able to return […]...
Keep on reading: Bb. Pilipinas runner-up Dalia Varde Khattab recounts getting stranded in Dubai

philippines.title: Bacolod City mayor stops unauthorized barangay tax collection
philippines.description:
BACOLOD CITY – Mayor Greg Gasataya has issued an executive order directing all barangays to immediately cease and desist from collecting unauthorized business taxes and clearance fees that do not comply with the Local Government Code (LGC). Gasataya on Friday said practices that violate the LGC must be corrected to protect the business sector and shield barangay officials from potential legal liabilities. The directive follows several complaints from the business sector regarding barangays imposing taxes beyond their legal authority and computing clearance fees based on gross sales or capital investment, he said. Under Section 152(a) of the Local Government Code, […]...
Keep on reading: Bacolod City mayor stops unauthorized barangay tax collection

philippines.title: UAAP men's volleyball: FEU secures top seed, UE upsets Ateneo
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines–Far Eastern University secured the top seed after squeaking past Adamson, 26-24, 22-25, 23-25, 25-9, 15-12, in the UAAP Season 88 men’s volleyball tournament on Saturday at UST Quadricentennial Pavilion. The Tamaraws hiked their record to 12-1 with only a game left in the elimination round. Defending champion National University is second at 10-2. Mikko Espartero topscored for FEU with 22 points, while Ariel Cacao also starred with 33 excellent sets. Dryx Saavedra added 17 on 13 attacks, three blocks and an ace. READ: UAAP men’s volleyball: FEU claims twice-to-beat, NU nears bonus Richard Besorio finished with 17 points […]...
Keep on reading: UAAP men's volleyball: FEU secures top seed, UE upsets Ateneo

energy.title: Tankers U-Turn in Persian Gulf as Iran Closes Hormuz Again
energy.description: ...and it's closed. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps declared Saturday that control of the strait has "returned to its previous state," walking back a brief opening announced Friday and directly contradicting a claim from President Donald Trump that the world's most critical oil chokepoint was fully open for business. Tehran's joint military command said the strait is now under "strict management and control of the armed forces" and accused the U.S. of "piracy" -- a reference to Washington's ongoing naval blockade of Iranian ports, which…

Under the Trump administration, NASA has enormous ambitions, going as far as to plan a permanent base on the moon, which will need never-before-seen energy innovations to maintain a secure source of power.
